ddls:
CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the warehouse */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse (in terms of volume or number of items) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "sales_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the sales team operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sales team */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the sales team */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the sales team */,
  "target_sales" REAL /* Target sales amount for the sales team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "preferred_shipping_method" TEXT /* Preferred shipping method of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  "is_subscribed_to_newsletter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the company's newsletter */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the store */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the store */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the store */,
  "store_size" INTEGER /* Size of the store (in square feet or meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product information was last updated */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the product (in days) */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the product (in months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, inventory) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time when the change occurred */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)
